name: kimi_claw_skill_bundle
changelog: 基于 0624(writeback + persistContract)合并我们的改动
催化剂 skill 拆分为 cn-catalyst-analysis(news_event/memo_research) + cn-sector-mapping(sector_tree/sector_stock_map)，mode 名不变、后端零改动
新增 market_cache.py 差异化 TTL 缓存(JSON 落本地，先查后写)
需求1: news_event 增加 earliestPublishTime + earliestSourceUrl(全网最早发布时间+来源URL)
需求2: memo_research 增加 researchCategory 五选一统一归类
搜索路由口径统一为并行，install.sh 备份移出 skills/ 防污染

skills.name: anysearch
skills.purpose: Realtime finance search + extract helper (AnySearch endpoints); analysis skills run it in parallel with kimi_search, not as a fallback

skills.name: cn-catalyst-analysis
skills.testedPrompt: 英伟达发布 Vera Rubin AI 芯片，对 A 股算力产业链影响

newRequirements.news_event: analysis.earliestPublishTime + analysis.earliestSourceUrl (全网最早发布时间+来源URL)
newRequirements.memo_research: analysis.researchCategory ∈ {行业纪要,公司纪要,专家交流,券商研报,专题研报}

skills.name: cn-sector-mapping
skills.testedPrompt: 把 AI 算力板块拆成子板块并映射 A 股个股

skills.name: us-stock-options-analysis
skills.framework: V4 基本面+期权（十二章）

earliestPublishDateResolver.purpose: 需求1: 对候选源逐个 anysearch extract，按 元数据>正文dateline>URL日期 三级解析，跨源取全网最早发布时间+URL

ttl.us_stock_options: market-aware: 1h intraday (US/Eastern 09:30-16:00), else until next open

cache.note: lookup before analyzing; fresh hit returns persisted local JSON (servedFromCache=true) and skips search+generation; store the final JSON after generation.

skills.name: cn-market-writeback
skills.purpose: Persist kimi-market-v1 analysis to backend ingest API (落库回写)
skills.notes: Reads ingest url/token from payload; never hardcodes host

engines: kimi_search (breadth coverage, Chinese news, source discovery)
searchRouting.modeNote: 两个引擎每次同时并发发起(batch_search 批量)，互补覆盖 + 交叉验证；不是主/备串行兜底。
notes: A-share: AnySearch finance.quote may fall back to Kimi Finance for realtime quote only
Real API keys and local runtime.conf are intentionally excluded from zip.
